title: RELATING TO LAND USE COMMISSION
siting_change_proposed: Context bill: amended 205-2(c)(d) and 205-4.5; wind already permitted in 205-2(d) as pre-existing text; no solar provisions

title: RELATING TO SOLAR ENERGY
sponsors: Morita + 40 others (Joint House-Senate Majority Caucus package): Awana; Belatti; Berg; Bertram; Brower; Cabanilla; Caldwell; Carroll; Chang; Chong; Green; Hanohano; Ito; Karamatsu; Lee; Luke; Magaoay; Manahan; McKelvey; Mizuno; Nishimoto; B.Oshiro; M.Oshiro; Rhoads; Saiki; Say; Shimabukuro; Sonson; Takai; Tokioka; Tsuji; Wakai; Waters; Yamashita; Evans; Har; Sagum; Souki; Takamine; Yamane
siting_change_proposed: Make solar energy facilities a permitted use in ag district on LSB class D or E soils only (amend 205-2(d)); introduced already D/E-limited; EEP HD1 inserted 10-acre/1%-of-parcel cap + grid-adjacency + insolation minimums (cap endorsed by Dept of Agriculture); WLH/AGR HD2 removed all caps
final_status: Enacted as Act 31 (SLH 2008) as HD2 (D/E-only permitted use, no acreage cap)
opponents_on_record: Maui County Farm Bureau (oppose); Hawaii Farm Bureau Federation (does not support HD1); DOA sought cap/conditions (comments/support-intent)

title: RELATING TO SOLAR ENERGY (companion to HB2502)
sponsors: Menor; Baker; Chun Oakland; English; Espero; Fukunaga; Gabbard; Hanabusa; Hooser; Ige; Ihara; Inouye; Kim; Kokubun; Nishihara; Sakamoto; Tokuda; Tsutsui; Bunda; Hee
siting_change_proposed: Same as HB2502: solar as permitted ag-district use on D/E soils
final_status: Passed Senate 25-0 (3/4/2008); crossed to House; no action after referral
died_in_committee: Yes - House EEP/WLH-AGR (never heard; HB2502 was the vehicle)
opponents_on_record: None recorded in Senate (passed AHW/ENE unamended)

title: RELATING TO AGRICULTURAL LANDS
sponsors: Menor; Baker; Chun Oakland; English; Espero; Fukunaga; Gabbard; Hanabusa; Hooser; Ige; Ihara; Inouye; Kim; Kokubun; Nishihara; Sakamoto; Tokuda; Tsutsui; Bunda; Hee; Taniguchi
siting_change_proposed: Permit agricultural-energy facilities in ag districts ONLY as accessory to farming: >=90% of enterprise acreage must be agricultural activity; energy from products of ag activities; 90% rule present from introduction (not a committee insertion)
opponents_on_record: None on record; HFBF + Maui County FB + HECO supported this accessory model; DOA support-intent; Honolulu DPP / Office of Planning / Hawaii's Thousand Friends comments

title: RELATING TO IMPORTANT AGRICULTURAL LANDS
siting_change_proposed: IAL incentives package (tax credit/loans/housing); CD1 text contains NO solar/wind/energy siting provisions (checked); 2011 OHA attribution of ag-energy facilities to Act 233 is imprecise (that is Act 145/SB2849)
final_status: Enacted as Act 233 (SLH 2008) per archived acts-by-bill list (GM921)
